meta.title: Navy Girlfriend Advice: Tips for when your boyfriend leaves for Navy boot camp
meta.description:
Brittani Krebbs from @BritCon2 is here to share her top 5 tips on how to get through Navy boot camp for girlfriends and spouses! 

Have a recruit at RTC Great Lakes? Send letters to your recruit from your phone or desktop with the Sandboxx app. Learn more about sending letters to RTC Great Lakes at the link below:
https://www.sandboxx.us/blog/send-your-first-letter-to-navy-boot-camp/
